# Research Brief: RF-CBC-001 (Pediatric CDS): Establish the neutropenia scope-exit /

**Objective.** RF-CBC-001 (Pediatric CDS): Establish the neutropenia scope-exit / red-flag evidence base for a pediatric CBC interpretation module — age-specific ANC thresholds, severe congenital neutropenia, malignancy and marrow-failure referral triggers, and safe scope boundaries (what the module must NOT interpret). Required output: authoritative pediatric sources with exact-passage locators + verbatim thresholds + a pediatric_cds evidence-card extension (population, assay/method, threshold, lifecycle) per claim. Longest-lead CBC item; gates P2 neutropenia branch. Guardrails: no invented thresholds; no diagnosis/treatment/dosing; conflicts never silently collapsed; missingness never normal. Use the pediatric module research template.

**Depth.** standard  |  **Audience.** technical

## Questions

- (rq_001) What does the evidence say about RF-CBC-001 (Pediatric CDS): Establish the neutropenia scope-exit /?
